headline: Privacy and data handling
subheadline: This page exists to support a compliant customer experience, ad network review, and transparent handling of leads, analytics, and payment-related records.

sections.title: What information is collected
sections.description: The site may collect contact details, newsletter signups, analytics events, checkout metadata, and operational logs needed to run the platform and respond to customer requests.

sections.title: How information is used
sections.description: Information is used to deliver services, improve the website, process transactions, communicate updates, and protect the platform against abuse or unauthorized access.

sections.title: Third-party services
sections.description: Payment processing, analytics, hosting, and media delivery may rely on third-party providers such as Stripe, PayPal, Cloudflare, and related infrastructure vendors.

sections.title: Retention and requests
sections.description: Data is retained only for operational, legal, security, and business purposes. Requests about access, correction, or deletion can be directed through the contact page.

cta.heading: Use the contact page for data requests or privacy questions.
cta.body: This keeps privacy operations visible and gives customers a clear route when they need a correction, export, or follow-up.
